text: Arpit Agarwala — Portfolio Overview ==================================== Name: Arpit Agarwala Location: Kolkata, India (Born in Rajasthan, raised in Assam) Education: BCom (Hons) at Bhawanipur Education Society College, 2023-2027 Professional Goal: Chartered Accountant (CA Intermediate candidate) CA Foundation: Cleared December 2023 Contact: - Email: arpitagarwalms@gmail.com - LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/arpitagarwala - GitHub: github.com/arpitagarwala - Instagram: arpit.agarwala_ - Website: [arpitagarwala.online](https://arpitagarwala.online) About: Arpit is a BCom (Hons) student and CA Intermediate aspirant who builds real-world tools at the intersection of finance and technology.

Core Platforms: [CA Bhaiya Platform](https://ca.arpitagarwala.online) — Arpit's AI-driven assistant for CA students, featuring a GenZ-focused 'Hinglish' AI persona. | [FinSight AI](https://finsight.arpitagarwala.online) — A robust Fintech platform (Next.js 16/React 19) that automates bank statement extraction and formatting into database-ready structures or CSVs. Includes financial dashboards and visual analytics. | [Design Studio](https://design.arpitagarwala.online) — Professional portfolio of design and UI works.

Hosted Web Tools (Finance & Productivity): [Expense Splitter](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/expense-splitter.html), [Budgeting Tool](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/budget.html), [Glassmorphic Calculator](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/calculator.html), [SIP & Finance Calculator](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/sip.html), [Gamified Pomodoro](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/pomodoro-gamified.html), [Cyberpunk Notepad](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/notepad.html), [Dark Neon Clock](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/clock.html), and [Speed Typing Master](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/typing-speed.html).

AI & Algorithm Visualizers: [Arpit's AI Avatar](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/ai-assistant.html), [Neural Network Visualizer](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/network.html), [Pathfinder AI Visualizer](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/pathfinder.html), and [GitHub README Studio](https://arpitagarwala.online/projects/github-readme-maker.html).

Games & Simulations: [Stock Market Simulator](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/market-sim.html), [Money Clicker](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/clicker.html), [Cyberpunk City Builder](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/city-builder.html), [2048 Strategy](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/2048.html), [Asteroids](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/asteroids.html), [Flappy Block](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/flappy.html), [Pong](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/pong.html), [Snake](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/snake.html), [Sudoku](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/sudoku.html), [Tic Tac Toe](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/tictactoe.html), [Memory Cards](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/memory.html), and [ASMR Rain Environment](https://arpitagarwala.online/games/asmr-rain.html).
